Layout parity

Synthetic text with a stable width verifies that editor rendering and direct browser rendering produce identical line breaks.

3 pages Deterministic fixture only

Typography remains measurable

Font family, weight, size, spacing, line height, client bounds, and scroll bounds are compared for every visible text node.

Public fixture No private document required

Clean clones reproduce the gate

Every release assertion now depends only on tracked source, synthetic fixtures, declared dependencies, and an explicitly selected browser.

1 shared contract Editor and exported HTML
